tweets.text:
Brr, it's cold out there! With winter temps in full swing, know the signs of potential harm from cold exposure:

❄️ Frostbite leads to numbness, discolored skin
❄️ Hypothermia signs include shivering, exhaustion & confusion

Both can happen fast in cold weather, so get #WinterReady with @Readygov ⬇️ 
https://t.co/z3u002Sgw8

tweets.text: DHS has effectively and sustainably worked to disincentivize irregular migration, including implementing @POTUS’s executive action. #WearBlueDay is this Saturday! Blue is the international color of #HumanTrafficking awareness, a horrific crime impacting the most vulnerable among us. Join @DHSBlueCampaign and post your picture wearing blue with the #WearBlueDay hashtag to help raise awareness ⬇️ 
https://t.co/loFAHeGFnG

tweets.text:
DHS is fighting the heinous crime of human trafficking through the Center for Countering Human Trafficking, led by @HSI_HQ, and the @DHSBlueCampaign, which educates the public, vulnerable communities, law enforcement, and industry partners to recognize and respond. Learn about our efforts this #HumanTraffickingPreventionMonth ⬇️
https://t.co/gYCVM34lUQ

tweets.text:
We know it's uncomfortable to think about, but combating human trafficking and online child sexual exploitation and abuse begins with open conversations. Because predators go where the kids are.

The @Know2Protect campaign was created to educate and empower children, teens, parents, trusted adults, and policy makers to prevent this heinous crime. Let's start the conversation today. ⬇️ 
https://t.co/2zmn9KF7Ub
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
NEW: DHS announced today the extension of Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for Ukraine for 18 months. The extension of TPS is due to ongoing armed conflict and extraordinary and temporary conditions in Ukraine that prevent eligible Ukrainian nationals from safely returning.

Read more: https://t.co/VqjQ9CibBc
tweets.text_resolved:
NEW: DHS announced today the extension of Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for Ukraine for 18 months. The extension of TPS is due to ongoing armed conflict and extraordinary and temporary conditions in Ukraine that prevent eligible Ukrainian nationals from safely returning.
